LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS JIE QIN ZHOU AND QUEEN'S HEALTH CENTER'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUNE 6, 2017, AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE PLAINTIFFS THE OPPORTUNITY TO RESPOND IN WRITING TO MOVING DEFENDANTS' ARGUMENT, MADE FOR THE FIRST TIME IN THEIR REPLY MEMORANDUM THAT ADDITIONAL REASON THAT THEIR REQUESTED STAY SHOULD BE GRANTED IS THAT QHC HAS CLOSED ITS BUSINESS AND VACATED THE PREMISES. PLAINTIFFS MAY FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION PAPERS LIMITED TO THAT NEW ARGUMENT NO LATER THAN MAY 25, 2017. DEFENDANT SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY TO BE FILED BY MAY 31, 2017. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 =302/HK

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Continued To Jun-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SAMUEL RAY, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-554-3668 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JONATHAN M. BLUTHE OF MURPHY PEARSON, TEL. NO. 1-415-788-1900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. Defendants Jie Qin Zhou and Queen's Health Center's motion to stay action is continued on the court's own motion to June 6, 2017 to give plaintiffs the opportunity to respond in writing to moving defendants' argument, made for the first time in their reply memorandum that additional reason that their requested stay should be granted is that QHC has closed its business and vacated the premises. Plaintiffs may file a supplemental opposition papers limited to that new argument no later than May 25, 2017. Defendant Supplemental Reply to be filed by May 31, 2017. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =302/hk
